created_by_slice: P94 Pack Import Runtime Planning v0
worktree_status: P94 verification ran with only P94 planning, docs, validator, tests, and metadata changes pending before commit.

No runtime files, pack imports, staging stores, source/evidence/candidate/index mutations, promotions, uploads, execution, URL fetching, credentials, telemetry, accounts, deployments, external source calls, or model calls were added.

gaps: pack import runtime is not implemented
operator approval is required before local dry-run runtime work
validate-only tool remains a script/tooling surface, not runtime import behavior
candidate effect reports remain future planning
real pack staging remains blocked until operator-approved local runtime work
promotion remains a separate future runtime after explicit approval
no accepted records or promotion decisions are created by P94

runtime_boundary: P94 does not implement pack import runtime.
No packs are imported into runtime state.
No real packs are staged beyond existing examples.
No source cache records are written.
No evidence ledger records are written.
No candidate index records are written.
No upload/admin/public contribution endpoints are added.
No database tables or persistent import queues are added.
pack_import_runtime_architecture_plan: future runtime/packs/quarantine.py manages an operator-approved quarantine root
future runtime/packs/stage.py manages deterministic local staging
future runtime/packs/diff.py builds candidate effect diffs
future runtime/packs/promote.py remains disabled in v0 and review-gated later
future runtime/packs/errors.py emits stable error envelopes

allowed_future_origins: local operator-provided pack path after explicit approval
community contribution pack future after public contribution contract
trust_rules: pack claims are untrusted until validated
validation is structural, not truth acceptance
invalid packs are rejected or quarantined
pack secrets/private paths cause rejection or redaction according to policy

validation_pipeline_plan: locate approved pack path or repo example
verify path is inside approved root
check schema version and pack kind
check forbidden fields, private paths, secrets, credentials
stop before mutation unless later explicit promotion runtime is approved
quarantine_staging_inspection_flow: quarantine root is an explicit operator-approved path, not a user-controlled request parameter
staging paths are deterministic and bounded
pack content is copied or referenced according to policy
no decompression bombs without future extraction policy
stage can be discarded without mutation
source_pack_import_plan: Validate source packs, normalize source identity, review source policy and connector posture, report source inventory candidate effects, and perform no live source calls, source cache mutation, or master index mutation.
evidence_pack_import_plan: Validate evidence packs, preserve claim/evidence/provenance, review rights/risk, preserve conflicts, report evidence ledger candidate effects with accepted_as_truth false, and perform no evidence ledger or master index mutation.
index_pack_import_plan: Validate index packs, verify identity/fixity, compare-only first, diff against public/local index, do not replace or mutate indexes, and require rollback policy before any future runtime.
contribution_pack_import_plan: Validate contribution packs, preserve contributor identity privacy, require no account in v0, report review queue candidate effects, require future anti-spam/poisoning policy, and allow no public contribution endpoint or automatic acceptance.
pack_set_import_plan: Validate pack sets, order dependencies, check cross-pack references, detect conflicts, require review, and perform no mutation or promotion.
privacy_path_secret_policy: reject private URLs unless redaction policy explicitly allows local-private future
reject IP/account/user identifiers in public examples
normalize paths as pack-internal logical paths only
no local filesystem scanning beyond approved pack root
executable_payload_content_safety_policy: no binary inspection beyond metadata unless future extraction sandbox is approved
no archive deep extraction unless future extraction policy is approved
payloads remain out of scope unless separately governed
rights_risk_provenance_review: pack license metadata may be recorded but is not rights clearance
mutation_promotion_boundary: quarantine may stage candidate material in future local store only after approval
source cache mutation requires source-cache runtime approval
evidence ledger mutation requires evidence-ledger runtime approval
candidate index mutation requires candidate runtime approval
public index mutation requires index rebuild/promotion approval
master index mutation requires master index review queue and explicit review
import runtime must not bypass promotion policy
public_contribution_boundary: P94 does not implement public contribution intake.
Public contribution requires separate contract, abuse policy, storage policy, privacy policy, and review workflow.
implementation_phases: Phase 0: keep runtime disabled; complete planning and validation
Phase 1: local dry-run import report over canonical examples only; no quarantine store; no mutation
Phase 2: local quarantine/staging runtime over operator-approved local packs; no promotion; no public endpoint
Phase 3: local review queue candidate generation; no accepted records
Phase 4: explicit promotion runtime for source/evidence/candidate stores after separate approval; transactional rollback required
Phase 5: hosted/private maintainer import workflow; still no public upload
Phase 6: public contribution intake only after separate contribution runtime, moderation, abuse, privacy, and storage contracts
acceptance_criteria: master index review queue contract valid

commands: rg --files contracts/packs control/audits examples scripts docs control/inventory .aide
initial_inspection.summary: Initial inspection started clean on main tracking origin/main. Pack contracts, examples, validators, validate-only import tooling, quarantine/staging model, staged-pack inspection, and review queue contracts were present.

p94_plan_validation.summary: P94 validator and focused tests passed; readiness is ready_for_local_dry_run_runtime_after_operator_approval.

pack_contract_import_staging_gates.summary: All pack/import/staging gates passed: source/evidence/index/contribution examples 1/1 each; pack set 5/5; import report 3/3; validate-only import 5/5; local quarantine/staging, staging path, local staging manifest, and staged inspector all valid. Tool outputs reported no import, staging, indexing, upload, network, runtime, public-search, local-index, or master-index mutation.

related_runtime_plans_and_contracts.summary: P82-P93 identity, merge, ranking, query-observation, connector-runtime, and page-runtime planning gates remained valid.

public_search_static_and_safety.summary: Public-search contracts, local runtime, safety evidence, hosted local rehearsal, static site, publication inventory, static artifact, and generated-artifact drift checks passed. Public search remains local_index_only; P94 added no public-query fanout or pack-import route.

hosted_deployment_and_baseline.summary: Hosted deployment evidence remains operator-gated: hosted backend not configured and configured static route verification failed. External baseline comparison remains not eligible with Manual Observation Batch 0 at 0 observed / 39 pending and 192 global pending slots.

evals_and_full_tests.summary: Archive evals passed 6/6 satisfied. Search usefulness remains 64 queries with capability_gap=7, covered=5, partial=40, source_gap=10, unknown=2. Unit discovers passed: tests/scripts 613, tests/operations 589, tests/hardening 53, tests/parity 25, runtime 320, surfaces 168, tests 1371. Architecture boundaries passed for 446 Python files. git diff --check exited 0 with line-ending warnings only.

optional.summary: Optional GitHub CLI and Cargo commands were unavailable because the executables are not installed.

remaining_blockers: Operator approval is required before local dry-run runtime work.
Pack import runtime is not implemented.
Runtime quarantine/staging store is not implemented.
Promotion runtime remains blocked and separate.
Source-cache, evidence-ledger, candidate-index, public-index, local-index, and master-index mutation remain blocked.
Public contribution intake, upload endpoints, admin endpoints, accounts, telemetry, and hosted moderation remain out of scope.
notes: P94 plans a validate-first, quarantine-first, inspect-before-promote future runtime only.

No runtime files, pack import runtime, real staging, source/evidence/candidate/index mutation, promotion decision, upload endpoint, execution, URL fetching, telemetry, accounts, credentials, deployment, external source call, or model call was added.
